summary: Completed testing of Film Distribution System feature. All 20 backend tests PASSED. Frontend testing verified pending films section, release popup with 3 distribution zones, cost/revenue calculations, and zone selection interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking the 'Rilascia' button inside the pending film card requires clicking on the card itself (parent div) rather than the button directly. The button click propagates but may need explicit onClick handler.

issues: Donation popup appears frequently and may interfere with testing - requires Escape key or clicking outside to dismiss

backend.pending_films_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/films/pending returns films with status='pending_release'
backend.distribution_config_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/distribution/config returns zones, countries, continents, studio_country
backend.release_national: PASS - POST /api/films/{id}/release with 'national' zone deducts funds/cinepass, updates status to 'in_theaters'
backend.release_requires_pending: PASS - Release fails with 400 if film is already released
backend.release_continental_requires_continent: PASS - Continental release requires distribution_continent parameter
backend.zone_multipliers_correct: PASS - National=0.4x, Continental=1.0x, World=2.5x revenue multiplier

frontend.pending_section_visible: PASS - 'FILM IN ATTESA DI RILASCIO' section shows on dashboard with pending films
frontend.release_popup_opens: PASS - Clicking pending film card opens distribution dialog
frontend.popup_shows_film_info: PASS - Shows film title, poster, quality score (85%)
frontend.popup_shows_three_zones: PASS - Nazionale, Continentale, Mondiale with costs and CinePass
frontend.popup_shows_estimated_revenue: PASS - Shows 'Stima incasso giorno 1' with calculated value
frontend.continental_shows_continent_selector: PASS - Continent dropdown appears when Continental selected
frontend.zone_selection_updates_costs: PASS - Selecting different zones updates cost and estimated revenue
frontend.cancel_closes_popup: PASS - Annulla button closes the dialog

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All release popup features working correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing pending film 'Il Ritorno del Gladiatore'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Film Distribution System fully tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter62_film_distribution.py covers all endpoints. Note: The first pending film ('Amore sotto la Pioggia') was released during testing via the test_release_national_success test. One pending film remains ('Il Ritorno del Gladiatore'). Donation popup may appear and needs Escape key to dismiss.

verified_features.GET /api/films/pending: Returns films with status='pending_release' for current user
verified_features.GET /api/distribution/config: Returns zones config with base_cost, cinepass_cost, revenue_multiplier, audience_multiplier
verified_features.POST /api/films/{id}/release: Changes film status to 'in_theaters', deducts costs, applies multipliers, returns success with opening_day_revenue
verified_features.Dashboard pending section: Shows 'FILM IN ATTESA DI RILASCIO' with count badge and pending films
verified_features.Release popup: Shows film info, 3 zones with costs/CinePass, estimated Day 1 revenue, continent selector for continental zone
